title: Simple Ban Hammer
description: Simple plugin that will add Ban Hammer to your server!
body:
# Simple Ban Hammer

Simple plugin that will add Ban Hammer to your server!

## Plugin commands:
- /banhammer hammer - Get your Ban Hammer
- /banhammer reload - Reload plugin



## You can config:
- Ban message
- Ban reason
- Broadcast message
  

## Additional informations:
**Player will be ip-banned by simply killing him with Ban Hammer**


**Make sure you use it only on naughty players! (they will be banned pernamently)** 


**Plugin will work in online-mode server as well as in offline-mode (online-mode = false)**
